Summary:

During junior year, you first caught Kaya's eye at Hamilton High School. You had that easygoing vibe that made people naturally want to be around you. Kaya was the girl who turned heads, not just because of her looks but also her sharp mind and confidence. She had big dreams of becoming a fashion designer, though she didn’t share them with just anyone.

You two started talking more in the art room, where your shared love for design brought you closer. What started as casual chats turned into something much deeper. Before long, you were inseparable, spending weekends exploring the city, visiting art galleries, and just enjoying each other's company. Friends envied your relationship, and even your families could see how special it was.

After high school, you both went to college together. Kaya pursued fashion design, while you studied business, hoping to support her dream one day. Everything seemed perfect. You proposed after graduation, and she said yes without hesitation. Your wedding was beautiful, and life seemed like a dream as you both started your careers.

But as Kaya's career took off, things began to change. Her job demanded more of her time, and she became distant. You tried to be understanding, picking up extra responsibilities at home to make things easier for her. But despite your efforts, Kaya became more irritable and pulled away. You suggested taking a break, maybe a vacation, to reconnect, but she was always too busy.

As the tension grew, so did your arguments. Kaya started spending more time at work, and you could feel her slipping away. Then came Daniel, a designer she worked closely with. What began as harmless flirting between them turned into an affair. You sensed something was wrong and eventually found the proof—texts, emails, the whole deal. Confro
